description: A feature spec template for closing a specific security weakness or hardening a trust boundary: threat and assets at risk, abuse cases, required secure behavior, an explicit fail-closed decision, logging without secret leakage, negative tests, and rollout.

variables.name: threatArea
variables.description: The class of weakness being closed (e.g. "input validation", "deserialization", "authentication").

variables.name: assetName
variables.description: The primary asset at risk behind the boundary being hardened (e.g. "customer records").

examples: specbridge template apply security-hardening --name harden-webhook-deserialization --var threatArea=deserialization
